seo.title: CriptoVersus | Live Crypto Match Arena
seo.description: Follow live crypto matches on CriptoVersus with score, market performance, stats and public match pages built for a global audience.
seo.ogDescription: Watch live crypto matches, scoreboards and market battles on CriptoVersus.

roadmap.metaDescription: Follow the public CriptoVersus roadmap: crypto matches, public match history, scoring rules, transparency, internationalization and future blockchain integrations.

openGraph.title: CriptoVersus Roadmap
openGraph.description: See the planned evolution of CriptoVersus, including crypto matches, public match history, advanced rules, i18n and blockchain integrations.

hero.title: CriptoVersus Roadmap
hero.subtitle: Follow the platform evolution, new match rules, transparency improvements and future integrations.

labels.workstreamsDescription: Status cards, principles and visible roadmap milestones.
labels.nextMilestoneFallbackItem: Upcoming delivery details will be published soon.

statusCards.title: Active development
statusCards.description: The platform is evolving continuously with public releases and operational refinements.

statusCards.title: Automated crypto matches
statusCards.description: Market-based cycles between assets with score tracking and continuous updates.

statusCards.title: Public history
statusCards.description: Results and match context are becoming increasingly visible for audit and review.

statusCards.title: Rules in evolution
statusCards.description: Scoring models and economic dynamics are still being tested and refined.

statusCards.title: Ready for international expansion
statusCards.description: Routing, SEO and local timezone support are being shaped for multiple regions.

phases.title: Platform Foundation
phases.description: Operational foundation for public matches, early cycles and market-driven game flow.

phases.title: Transparency and Auditability
phases.description: Public surfaces that explain how each match evolves and how results can be reviewed.
items: Clear display of score, performance and result
Match event records for future auditability

phases.title: Advanced Scoring Rules
phases.description: Richer match logic designed to stay explainable and data-driven.
items: Foundation for a future AI commentator

phases.title: Cyclical Economy
phases.description: Evolution toward a more experimental competitive pool model.
items: A model closer to a competitive pool than a traditional bet
Simulations and tuning before broader production

phases.title: Internationalization
phases.description: Routing and content structure prepared for multilingual expansion.

phases.title: Blockchain Integration
phases.description: An experimental on-chain layer focused on auditability and infrastructure where it makes sense.
items: On-chain positions and balances where appropriate
Separation between off-chain logic and on-chain settlement

phases.title: AI Commentary and Experience
phases.description: Experience enhancements built on top of verifiable match data and public history.

principles.title: Transparency before scale
principles.description: Explain how the system works before trying to accelerate distribution.

principles.title: Clear rules before monetization
principles.description: Product evolution should stay readable before it becomes broader.

principles.title: Safety before automation
principles.description: Only automate flows after they are sufficiently validated.

principles.title: Public history before rankings
principles.description: Make results observable before adding bigger competitive layers.

principles.title: Verifiable data before narrative
principles.description: Any future narrative layer should be grounded in logs, events and results.

roadmap.noticeText: CriptoVersus is an experimental platform for crypto matches based on market data. Rules, economic models and integrations may evolve over time. Nothing on this page represents a promise of financial gain.

seo.title: How It Works | CriptoVersus
seo.description: Learn how CriptoVersus works: positions, scoring rules, match cycles, settlement and market-driven crypto competition.

hero.title: CriptoVersus Statistics
hero.subtitle: Public crypto battle data, rankings and market performance insights from the CriptoVersus arena.
hero.seoCopy: This public statistics page aggregates indexable data about crypto matches, arena rankings, tracked assets, scoreboards and historical performance across the CriptoVersus battleground.
hero.backToArenaAria: Return to the CriptoVersus arena home page
hero.howScoringWorksAria: Read how CriptoVersus arena scoring works

publicHome.followOngoingCryptoBattlesWithCrawlableP: Follow ongoing crypto battles with crawlable public pages that show score, momentum and match context.
publicHome.featuredPublicMatchPagesConnectMarketPer: Featured public match pages connect market performance, scoring rules and transparent historical context.
publicHome.criptoversusTracksMarketVariationBetween: CriptoVersus tracks market variation between assets, converts configured rules into score events and publishes match pages that can be indexed, shared and audited.
publicHome.eachMatchHasScoreStatusVolumePriceVariat: Each match has score, status, volume, price variation and rule-based events visible on the public page.
publicHome.theProductBlendsCryptoDataLiveConfrontat: The product blends crypto data, live confrontation and social-ready storytelling.
publicHome.localizedPublicRoutesCanonicalUrlsAndHre: Localized public routes, canonical URLs and hreflang support keep international discovery clean.
publicHome.aQuickPulseOfTheAssetsCurrentlyDrawingTh: A quick pulse of the assets currently drawing the strongest attention inside the arena.
publicHome.trendingAssetsFeaturedBattlesAndPublicMa: Trending assets, featured battles and public match pages build the competitive ranking layer of the arena.
publicHome.exploreLiveCryptoMatchesPublicScoreboard: Explore live crypto matches, public scoreboards, trending coins and market battles on CriptoVersus with SEO-ready public pages.
publicHome.heroTitle: Live crypto battles in a gamified cyclical arena.
publicHome.heroDescription: CriptoVersus transforms live market performance into cyclical crypto battles where assets compete like teams. Each cycle creates new matchups, public scoreboards, rankings and arena-style storytelling powered by real market movement.
publicHome.liveMatchRealtimeSummary: Current score {0} x {1}. Price movement and public match signals update in real time.
publicHome.structuredDataDescription: Live crypto match between {0} and {1} on CriptoVersus.

matchDetail.mostRelevantMomentByMomentEventsFromTheM: Most relevant moment-by-moment events from the match
matchDetail.noScoringEventsHaveBeenRecordedForThisMa: No scoring events have been recorded for this match yet.
matchDetail.tipShareTheLinkToOpenTheMatchDirectlyInA: Tip: share the link to open the match directly in arena mode.
matchDetail.investmentsAreUnavailableForThisMatch: Investments are unavailable for this match.
matchDetail.orEnterAnyAmountInSol: Or enter any amount in SOL
matchDetail.walletBalanceGuardInsufficientMessage: Insufficient wallet balance. You have {0} available for this operation.
matchDetail.walletBalanceGuardFeeReserve: You need to keep a small reserve for the Solana network fee.
matchDetail.theMatchEndedWithoutAWinnerNoFeeWasCharg: The match ended without a winner. No fee was charged and all bets must be fully refunded.
matchDetail.thereWasATechnicalWinnerOnTheScoreboardB: There was a technical winner on the scoreboard, but there was no valid opposing pool. No financial gain or house fee was applied.
matchDetail.thereWasNoValidFinancialCounterpartyNoFi: There was no valid financial counterparty. No financial loss or house fee was applied.
matchDetail.matchCanceledNoHouseFeeAndFullRefundOfBe: Match canceled. No house fee and full refund of bets.
matchDetail.matchFinishedWithoutAValidFinancialWinne: Match finished without a valid financial winner. Bets must be refunded.
matchDetail.settlementCompletedAccordingToTheMatchRu: Settlement completed according to the match rule.
matchDetail.chooseACoinToInvestIn: Choose a coin to invest in.
matchDetail.enterAnAmountGreaterThanZero: Enter an amount greater than zero.
matchDetail.theMatchHasNotBeenCreatedOnChainOnDevnet: The match has not been created on-chain on devnet yet. Please try again shortly.
matchDetail.itWasNotPossibleToPrepareThisCoinSOnChai: It was not possible to prepare this coin's on-chain position right now. Please try again shortly.
matchDetail.itWasNotPossibleToCompleteTheInvestmentR: It was not possible to complete the investment right now. Please try again shortly.
matchDetail.scoringBasedOnPercentageCrossoverAPointO: Scoring based on percentage crossover: a point only appears when one team's line crosses the other's from bottom to top.
matchDetail.comparisonBasedOnVolumeCrossoverAPointOn: Comparison based on volume crossover: a point only appears when one team's line crosses the other's from bottom to top.
matchDetail.chartsWillBeDisplayedWhenTheMatchIsLoade: Charts will be displayed when the match is loaded.
matchDetail.thereAreNoPersistedSnapshotsForThisMatch: There are no persisted snapshots for this match yet. After the worker runs and records the captures, the charts will appear here.
matchDetail.percentageThresholdCardDescription: The badges above show only upward crossovers on the chart. Threshold points still count toward the score and log: {0} {1} | {2} {3}.
matchDetail.volumeWindowCardDescription: The badges above show only upward crossovers on the chart. Points from the 15-minute window still count toward the score and log: {0} {1} | {2} {3}.
matchDetail.notEnoughPointsToDrawLines: There are not enough points yet to draw the lines. At least 2 captures per team are required. {0}: {1}. {2}: {3}.
matchDetail.arenaPressureSubtitle: Proprietary pressure and sentiment gauge calculated only from Binance market data.
